TRANSCRIPT CONTEXT:
[1086.150-1198.870] interviewee: questions. They didn't know-- there was no orders what to do with the Jews. And he said, oh, he welcomed me. And now go back to your hometown. It's already in Germany. And they helped me even with transportation and trucks and cars-- either way. And in a few days, I was already home. We marched 10 days. But maybe two,  three days I was home already.
[1198.870-1228.540] interviewee: The other colleagues who went to Russia-- there is not one alive. They all were killed in '40 in Katyn by the

already home. We marched
